arts.ttl: Inter snatch late win to break Urawa Reds' hearts
arts.sum: Valentin Carboni scored in the second minute of second-half stoppage time to complete Inter Milan's rally to a 2-1 victory over Urawa Red Diamonds.

arts.ttl: Inter Player Ratings vs Urawa: Argentines Save the Day
arts.sum: Inter pulled off a late comeback to beat Urawa Red Diamonds 2-1 in their second game at the 2025 FIFA World Cup. Cristian Chivu's men were on the verge of a near-certain elimination but managed to fight back and take a crucial win. The post Inter Player Ratings vs Urawa: Argentines Save the Day appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
